_comment: Build ledger for the packaged desktop exe. APP_VERSION (dev/working number) lives in index.html; each build mints a buildTag = two random words + -V<buildCount>. On the next build: increment buildCount, generate two fresh random words, set buildTag, then cargo tauri build. Mirrors the Leather Pattern Designer's workflow.

history.note: auto-update + updater signing; first signed build
v0.0.3 release (CI): controls + props panel + theme/prefs persistence + welcome screen
theme toggle button (#24) + keyboard-accessible ARIA menubar (#22)
seam-aware 3D: consume v15 assembly (S0) + auto-stack from seams/layers (S1-S2) + fold to assembled preview (S3)

card-holder feedback U1-U5: top-right pill toggle + name/version (U1), default thickness 1mm (U2), camera focus/pivot + F shortcut (U3), stitch-hole style round/diamond/french (U4), saddle-stitch thread both faces + slant (U5)
U6 partial/unequal-length seams: consume assembly-schema v2 (member t0/t1 sub-span + seam fit/anchor); clipPolyByT, anchored align2D, Tier-1 length + Tier-2 gap skipped for partial joins

stitch slant follows the seam line: addThreadMesh centres each stitch on the seam + tilts by a constant iron angle (stitchSlant), replacing the fixed-mm opposite-side offset that crossed the line / went near-perpendicular at tight spacing

U7 shared stitch across stacked pieces: buildAssembly carries seam.stitch + runs before stitch loop; seamStitchSegments3D resamples each member to the same N+1 points so holes coincide through the stack; edgeStitched skips seam-owned edges
stitch fixes: threads no longer mirrored per face (both faces same slant); shared-stitch holes inset by the margin (insetEdgePoly); threads shortened to read as distinct slanted dashes
